landing.heroBadge: Cuidado de la piel con IA
landing.heroDesc1: Rebi analyzes your skin together with your sleep, stress, and environment to build a holistic routine backed by science.
landing.heroDesc2: After the analysis, your AM/PM steps, lifestyle guidance, and weather-aware protection notes are gathered in one place. You can safely store photos to compare progress, and daily check-ins let the routine adapt over time.
landing.plusDesc: Core analysis and routine are free for everyone. With Plus, the AI chat limit is removed, premium themes unlock, and your daily check-in flow runs at full strength.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just products—Rebi connects sleep, stress, water, and nutrition signals to your routine.
landing.disclaimer: Rebi is not a medical diagnosis or prescription. It guides you with safety layers like cautious frequency for strong actives and barrier-first logic. When in doubt, consult a healthcare professional.
landing.differenceSubtitle: Not “you have acne → use acne cream”. We collect your signals and adapt your plan over time.

difference.scanDesc: Optional photo scan improves tracking and progress comparisons over time.
difference.collectTitle: Collect your data, not one-off guesses
difference.collectDesc: Sleep, stress, water, location/weather, symptoms and habits are used together.
difference.adaptDesc: Your routine can change with daily check-ins and tracking events.
difference.ingredientsDesc: Guides by active ingredients and concentrations—never pushes specific brands.

features.cameraDesc: Take skin photos and let AI track changes over time.
features.holisticDesc: Evaluates sleep, stress, and water intake alongside skin health.
features.weatherDesc: Daily protection tips based on UV and humidity.

plus.unlimitedAiDesc: Continuous chat for skincare, ingredients, and product questions.
plus.premiumThemesDesc: Exclusive looks like sunset, ocean, and night city.
plus.deepTrackingDesc: Daily check-ins adapt your routine to your skin's response.

auth.loginToAccount: Inicia sesión en tu cuenta Rebi

subscribe.title: Rebi Plus
subscribe.subtitle: Unlimited AI chat and premium themes

themes.title: Choose a theme
themes.subtitle: Free themes are available to everyone. Plus unlocks premium looks.

analyze.photoTooDark: This looks dark; try natural light and a closer, steady shot.
analyze.photoTooBlurry: This may be blurry; hold steady or tap to focus.
analyze.photoQualityOk: Photo quality looks OK for tracking.

checkin.alreadyDesc: Only one check-in is saved per day. Come back tomorrow.
checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.subtitle: How do you feel today?
checkin.symptomsHint: Improves risk accuracy; you can leave this empty.
checkin.reactionSeverityHint: Helps learn tolerance for strong actives (1 = mild, 3 = strong).
checkin.feedbackTitle: Was this report helpful for you?

chat.subtitle: Skincare for face & hands
chat.welcome: Hi {{name}}! I'm Rebi, your skincare assistant. Ask me anything about face and hand care—products, ingredients, routines, and concerns. How can I help?
chat.placeholder: Ask about products, ingredients, or concerns...

dashboard.noAnalyzeDesc: You haven't completed an analysis yet. Start your analysis or chat with Rebi AI. Daily check-in becomes available after you accept your routine.
dashboard.dailyCheckinSubtitle: How do you feel today? Your routine adapts accordingly.
dashboard.noPlannedSteps: No planned skincare step for today; check your weekly usage days.
dashboard.weeklyHint: These steps are shown only on the selected days in the day cards above.
dashboard.productListSubtitle: Active ingredients mentioned in your routine
dashboard.acceptHint: To use daily check-in, first start tracking by accepting your routine below.
dashboard.acceptBanner: When you're ready to follow your routine, accept it below to unlock daily check-in and tracking. You can review the plan before accepting.
dashboard.acceptCta: I accept my routine, start tracking
dashboard.feelsTodayHint: How do you feel today? Your routine will adapt accordingly.
dashboard.quickLogHint: Adds to today’s tracking; lightly influences check-in risk.
dashboard.routineByDaySubtitle: AM/PM steps per day; the number indicates the application order.
dashboard.howToChooseTitle: How to choose the suggested ingredients
dashboard.howToChooseDesc: You choose the brand; Rebi guides by active ingredients and concentrations. Weekly strong steps show which days to use; day cards are filtered accordingly.
dashboard.howToChooseBullet1Body: If a line lists multiple ingredients (e.g., ceramides + squalane or hydration + BHA), they are usually not in one bottle; you can build it with separate products. Order = application order (watery toner/serum first, then richer moisturizer).
dashboard.howToChooseBullet2Body: Exact % matches are not required; starting close and lower is often enough. Avoid jumping to much stronger formulas before checking tolerance.
dashboard.howToChooseBullet3Body: Prefer clear ingredient lists and trustworthy sellers or pharmacies.
dashboard.howToChooseBullet4Body: If you're sensitive to fragrance/alcohol, check the INCI. Patch test first. If unsure, ask a pharmacist or dermatologist.
dashboard.everyDayAllDayHint: Repeats daily: water, movement, daily balance summary and nutrition notes. Breathing and evening sleep routines appear in the day cards under lifestyle AM/PM.
dashboard.lifestyleSupportsSubtitle: Nutrition, water, sleep, and lifestyle guidance
